notes: v35.0 MAJOR • Code.gs redeploy required. Fixes Sonnet v34.3 regressions: restored working API_URL (emails), replaced wizard Step 2 checkboxes with multi-select pills (fixes Loans crash), shrunk login signup to a compact blue link. New work: true pending-approval withdrawal flow (parent email approve/deny, child banner shows awaiting), share-child welcome email to receiving parent, chained sheet-to-sheet crossfade (no slide-down/up jerk). Wizard pills: no default selection on Steps 1/2/3/5/6/8; Step 1 Add Photo button always available. Parent tab Adjust renamed to Money. Allowance, Interest Rates, Savings Goals moved from Settings to Money tab. Combined 'Allowance & Interest' sheet with Annual Earnings projection + one Save All. Annual Earnings removed from Child Profile. Parent top bar restructured: Managing label + child avatar above Switch Child/Log Out. Avatar removed from Checking card. Split presets: 5 buttons 1.5x larger. Android back button stack with Exit confirm; wizard excluded (uses in-wizard Back only). Withdrawal sheet auto-closes after submit.
